basic_details.job_title: Lakshmibai College Delhi Non-Teaching Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 24 Assistant, Junior Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Lakshmibai College Delhi has officially released a recruitment notification for Non-Teaching Staff. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for all posts is generally around 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as follows: SC/ST: 5 years OBC (NCL): 3 years PwD: 10 years PwD + OBC (NCL): 13 years PwD + SC/ST: 15 years Ex-servicemen commissioned Officers including ECO/SSCOS: 5 years Permanent Employee Government department/Statutory Autonomous bodies/Universities/Affiliated or constituent college under the university/public sector undertakings: 5 years or number of years (in completed years) whichever is less, provided they have rendered at least three years regular service. Department candidates of University of Delhi and its colleges: Upper age limit shall not be insisted upon. Persons who are already working on contract/daily wages/ad-hoc basis in the University of Delhi or its college(s): Upper age limit will be relaxed to the extent of service rendered by them in the University of Delhi or its colleges provided they have put in at least one year of service.

content_sections.heading: Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026 notification released for 24 posts of Non-Teaching Staff. Candidates with Any Bachelors Degree, 10TH, M.Lib Can Apply Online. The Online application process for Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026 has started on 11-06-2026 and will remain open until 01-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Lakshmibai College Delhi website, lakshmibaicollege.in.

Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

content_sections.heading: Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026 Notification Overview
content_sections.text: The Lakshmibai College Delhi has officially released a recruitment notification for Non-Teaching Staff. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

rows.lakshmibai_college_delhi_advt_no_lbc_nta: Application Fee For Unreserved Candidates : 1000.00 For OBC (NCL)/EWS Candidates : 800.00 For SC, ST Candidates: 500.00 For PwBD and Women candidates: Nil
Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026 Important Dates Last Date for Apply Online : 01-07-2026

Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026 Age Limit The maximum age limit for all posts is generally around 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as follows: SC/ST: 5 years OBC (NCL): 3 years PwD: 10 years PwD + OBC (NCL): 13 years PwD + SC/ST: 15 years Ex-servicemen commissioned Officers including ECO/SSCOS: 5 years Permanent Employee Government department/Statutory Autonomous bodies/Universities/Affiliated or constituent college under the university/public sector undertakings: 5 years or number of years (in completed years) whichever is less, provided they have rendered at least three years regular service. Department candidates of University of Delhi and its colleges: Upper age limit shall not be insisted upon. Persons who are already working on contract/daily wages/ad-hoc basis in the University of Delhi or its college(s): Upper age limit will be relaxed to the extent of service rendered by them in the University of Delhi or its colleges provided they have put in at least one year of service.

Eligibility Criteria Librarian: Master's Degree in Library Science & Information Science/Documentation Science or equivalent. Consistently good academic record with knowledge of computerization/digitalization of library. Cleared NET/SLET/SET or awarded Ph.D. Degree as per UGC Regulations. Assistant: Bachelor Degree from a recognized Institute/University. Speed in English Typing @ 35 wpm or Hindi Typing @ 30 wpm. Proficiency in Computer operations. Two years experience as Junior Assistant/Equivalent posts in University/Research Establishment Central State Govt./PSU/Autonomous Bodies or equivalent pay package in reputed private companies/corporate bank with a minimum annual turnover of at least Rs. 200/- crores or more. Lab Assistant: Bachelor's degree with minimum two years of working and maintenance experience of sophisticated scientific Instruments in the Laboratory. Relevant subject as decided by the university. In University/ Research establishment / Central / State Govt. / PSU and other autonomous bodies or Private organization of repute with annual turnover of minimum Rs.200/- Crores. Junior Assistant: Bachelor's Degree from any recognized Institute/ University. English Typing @ 35 wpm OR Hindi Typing @ 30 wpm. Proficiency in Computer Operations. Library Attendant: 10+2 or its equivalent examination from a recognized Board. Certificate course in Library Science from a recognized Institution. Lab Attendant: 10+2 with Science stream from any recognized Central/ State Board OR 10th Pass from any recognized Central/ State Board with Science as one of the subjects and skill certificate program in Laboratory Technology or ITI in relevant trade.
Salary Librarian: Academic Pay Level-10 Assistant: Pay Level-4 Lab Assistant: Pay Level-4 Junior Assistant: Pay Level-2 Library Attendant: Pay Level-1 Lab Attendant: Pay Level-1
Lakshmibai College Delhi Non-Teaching Staff Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online

Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for all posts is generally around 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as follows: SC/ST: 5 years OBC (NCL): 3 years PwD: 10 years PwD + OBC (NCL): 13 years PwD + SC/ST: 15 years Ex-servicemen commissioned Officers including ECO/SSCOS: 5 years Permanent Employee Government department/Statutory Autonomous bodies/Universities/Affiliated or constituent college under the university/public sector undertakings: 5 years or number of years (in completed years) whichever is less, provided they have rendered at least three years regular service. Department candidates of University of Delhi and its colleges: Upper age limit shall not be insisted upon. Persons who are already working on contract/daily wages/ad-hoc basis in the University of Delhi or its college(s): Upper age limit will be relaxed to the extent of service rendered by them in the University of Delhi or its colleges provided they have put in at least one year of service.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies available in Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Lakshmibai College Delhi has announced a total of 24 vacancies for various Non-Teaching Staff posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply online for Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. When did the online application process begin?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 11 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the posts available under this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes Librarian, Assistant, Lab Assistant, Junior Assistant, Library Attendant, and Lab Attendant posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification required for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university along with the required typing speed and computer proficiency.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification required for the Library Attendant post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have passed 10+2 or equivalent and possess a Certificate Course in Library Science from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: Unreserved category candidates are required to pay an application fee of ₹1,000.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee exemption for women candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the maximum age limit for Lakshmibai College Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for most posts is generally 32 years, with age relaxation available for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q10. Where can candidates apply for Lakshmibai College Delhi Non-Teaching Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of Lakshmibai College Delhi before the closing date.
